title: Get RATING-by-magazine-issue Relationship
description:
* The ›by-magazine-issue‹ relationship for the selected RATING is returned when one exists. -> Status Code \`200\`
* The response contains the relationship ID, the relationship name and the relationship partner.
* An empty response is returned when the selected RATING has no ›by-magazine-issue‹ relationship. -> Status Code \`200\`
* Requests with invalid ID are rejected. This can happen when there exists no node with the given ID or it is not a RATING. -> Status Code \`404\`
